63e31d9ebc8f282ed3d43799.leadin: A collection of this man's letters to his friend Esther Johnson would be published after his death with the title Journal to Stella. For 10 points each:
63e31d9ebc8f282ed3d43799.leadin_sanitized: A collection of this man's letters to his friend Esther Johnson would be published after his death with the title Journal to Stella. For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this writer who argued against debased coins in Ireland in his Drapier's Letters, and whose other Ireland-related writings include the suggestion that the Irish sell their children as food, A Modest Proposal.
Swift is best-known for this satirical picaresque detailing the adventures of the titular captain in lands such as Brobdingnag and Blefusco.
Peter, Martin, and Jack, who represent Catholicism, Anglicanism, and Dissenters, are the main characters of this Swiftian satire, often published together with The Battle of the Books.
parts_sanitized: Identify this writer who argued against debased coins in Ireland in his Drapier's Letters, and whose other Ireland-related writings include the suggestion that the Irish sell their children as food, A Modest Proposal.
Swift is best-known for this satirical picaresque detailing the adventures of the titular captain in lands such as Brobdingnag and Blefusco.
Peter, Martin, and Jack, who represent Catholicism, Anglicanism, and Dissenters, are the main characters of this Swiftian satire, often published together with The Battle of the Books.
answers: Gulliver's Travels or Travels into Several Remote Nations of the World, in Four Parts, by Lemuel Gulliver, First a Surgeon, and Then a Captain of Several Ships
